channel.title: Fixture Cyber Feed
channel.description: Deterministic sample articles for tests and demos

item.title: Critical zero-day CVE-2026-1234 in Fortinet FortiOS actively exploited, patch now
item.description: A critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-1234 with a CVSS score of 9.8 is being actively exploited in the wild. Ransomware groups are targeting unpatched FortiOS devices. Vendors urge customers to apply the emergency patch immediately.

item.title: Healthcare giant confirms data breach exposing 4 million patient records
item.description: Attackers stole customer data including names, social security numbers, and credentials. The leaked database was posted on a dark web forum. The breach is attributed to a known ransomware campaign.

item.title: APT group launches phishing campaign against European energy sector
item.description: Researchers observed an ongoing campaign by a state-sponsored APT deploying custom malware via spear-phishing. The attack chain abuses a recently patched vulnerability, and some victims report active exploitation.

item.title: Vendor releases quarterly security newsletter roundup
item.description: A roundup of industry events, webinars, and product announcements from the past quarter.

item.title: Critical zero-day CVE-2026-1234 in Fortinet FortiOS actively exploited, patch now
item.description: Duplicate syndicated copy of the FortiOS zero-day story.

item.title: Rumor: possible breach at unnamed company
